title: Static Accessibility Evidence, WCAG Mapping, and Review Handoff · Runtime Contract: Image Purpose
summary: The crawler counts alt values and headings then declares WCAG compliance without computed names, interactions, contrast, reflow, or disabled-user review. Predict owner authority, URL and HTTP state, Go ownership, bounded work, accessibility impact, failure, cleanup, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the crawler go image purpose increment in WCAG-linked static finding ledger. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case prac…
objectives: Classify informative, decorative, functional, linked, complex, grouped, and text images using surrounding purpose and review uncertainty.
Decode bounded JSON-LD as untrusted values, validate supported shapes, preserve unknowns, and state eligibility non-claims.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
